title: truellum debile
side_effects: Truellum debile can have side effects if used improperly, such as severe allergic reactions, nausea, and dizziness. In some cases, overconsumption of the plant's extracts can lead to respiratory problems, including shortness of breath and wheezing. Improper use can also cause gastrointestinal issues, such as stomach ulcers and diarrhea. Furthermore, excessive exposure to the plant's toxins can cause long-term damage to the liver and kidneys.
